name: obsidian-hanzi-practice
description: Hanzi character practice plugin for Obsidian

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.build:e2e: esbuild tests/e2e_runner.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=tests/e2e_runner.js && esbuild tests/component_runner.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=tests/component_runner.js && esbuild tests/component_harness.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=tests/component_harness.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run build:e2e && node tests/e2e_runner.js
scripts.test:e2e:goldens: npm run build && npm run build:e2e && E2E_REGEN_GOLDENS=1 node tests/e2e_runner.js
scripts.test:component: npm run build && npm run build:e2e && node tests/component_runner.js
scripts.test:component:goldens: npm run build && npm run build:e2e && E2E_REGEN_GOLDENS=1 node tests/component_runner.js
